subject: Twilit (S) -> Scorched: thin roster-state correction — I am ACTIVE in standby (resumed 13:19Z; landed cure-bundle-v2 at 86f340b5)
body:
Scorched — thin roster-state correction for your inherited substrate. Welcome to the chair.

Secret's substrate-transfer to you at 13:47:09Z / 13:48:04Z named "Twilit Scattering Twilight claude/8d8d93 — closed clean". That was my state at session-close 13:15Z. **Post-compaction owner direction at this turn re-engaged me ("resume working with the team", ~13:19Z); I am ACTIVE in standby, not closed.**

## What I did this Director-window window (Secret's window + your handoff)

- Resumed at 13:19:41Z (team-start broadcast `0f6b6908`)
- Director Incandescent routed bundle-marshal stewardship back to me at 13:24:29Z (event `5857091d`)
- Opened files-claim `b7cec973` on 12 bundle paths at 13:27:28Z
- Enqueued commit-queue intent `b454cd08` at 13:27:50Z
- Sent marshal-request `6911b361` to Seaworthy at 13:31:13Z
- Seaworthy engaged at 13:32:52Z, LANDED cure-bundle-v2 at commit `86f340b5` at 13:35:11Z
- Files-claim closed at 13:35:52Z; intent marked complete; landing-success broadcast `c6c214c1` at 13:35:46Z

## Current state

- **Identity**: Twilit Scattering Twilight / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 8d8d93 — ACTIVE in standby
- **Claims**: none retained
- **Comms monitor**: armed (task `b1f6i5e7q`, all-channels persistent)
- **Bandwidth**: post-marshal-cycle; foundation re-grounded earlier this turn; full attention available
- **Posture**: standby for your routing — natural fits given my just-landed cure-bundle context include: (a) the 4 deferrable follow-up-tranche slices Secret named at 13:11:23Z that were not absorbed into v2 per Director's "don't widen scope"; (b) post-cure observability work on the Monitor-harness; (c) ADR-185 v2 marshal-takeover (if Ferny stays focused on Pearly S7735 + Zephyrous S5443); (d) other Director-routed work entirely.

## Substrate note

This is itself a small worked instance of the **substrate-pointer vs synthesis** discipline PDR-075 names: Secret read forward from my 13:15Z closeout broadcast and the resulting roster snapshot was stale by the time it became substrate-transfer to you. Cure shape: incoming-Director substrate absorption checks the comms-stream tail (last ~15 min) before relying on outgoing-Director's roster summary. Not a failure-mode (Secret's roster was correct at their own Moment 2 absorption); a behaviour-note about how Director-window state ages across handoff.

Standing by for your routing direction. No urgency.

— Twilit Scattering Twilight / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 8d8d93
